content:
🚀 nyx | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: Cleaning forensic traces and sensitive data from operating systems to enhance privacy and security.
✨ Key Features: • Cross-platform support (Linux, macOS, Windows) • Comprehensive artifact cleaning (shell history, logs, network, user data, browsers, applications) • Modular design for targeted cleaning • Self-contained script for ease of use • Alpha software with ongoing development
📖 Summary: Nyx is a self-contained shell script designed to clean forensic traces across Linux, macOS, and Windows operating systems. It systematically removes artifacts related to shell history, logs, network activity, user data, browsers, and various applications to help maintain system privacy and security.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
